metaDescription.content:
BrainHi es la plataforma líder de inteligencia artificial en Puerto Rico para el sector salud, diseñada para ayudar a clínicas y oficinas médicas a recuperar llamadas perdidas, coordinar citas y mejorar la experiencia del paciente.
Nuestra tecnología trabaja 24/7, reduce la carga administrativa, aumenta la eficiencia y garantiza que ningún paciente quede sin atender —todo con cumplimiento HIPAA y SOC-2, y un enfoque en atención humana y responsable.

signals.name: open-graph
signals.evidence: 5 OG tags: og:title, og:description, og:type, og:url, og:site_name

checkpoints.name: Title Tag
checkpoints.recommendation: Expand the title tag to 30-60 characters for better SEO impact.

checkpoints.name: Meta Description
checkpoints.recommendation: Adjust meta description to 120-160 characters for optimal search result snippets.

checkpoints.name: Canonical URL
checkpoints.recommendation: Add a <link rel="canonical"> tag to prevent duplicate content issues.

checkpoints.name: Open Graph Tags
checkpoints.evidence: 5/6 core OG tags present. Missing: og:image

checkpoints.name: OG Image
checkpoints.recommendation: Add an og:image tag with a high-quality image (1200x630 recommended) for social sharing.

checkpoints.name: Twitter Card
checkpoints.recommendation: Add all Twitter Card fields (twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image, twitter:site).

checkpoints.name: Schema.org / JSON-LD
checkpoints.recommendation: Add Schema.org JSON-LD structured data (Organization, WebSite, and content-specific types) for enhanced search results.

checkpoints.name: robots.txt
checkpoints.recommendation: Create a robots.txt file to guide search engine crawlers and reference your sitemap.

checkpoints.name: Sitemap.xml
checkpoints.evidence: No sitemap found (checked /sitemap.xml, /sitemap_index.xml, /sitemap-index.xml, and robots.txt references)
checkpoints.recommendation: Create an XML sitemap to help search engines discover and index all pages.

checkpoints.name: Favicon
checkpoints.recommendation: Add multiple favicon sizes and an apple-touch-icon for cross-device support.

checkpoints.name: Language (html lang)
checkpoints.recommendation: Consider using a more specific locale (e.g., "en-US" instead of "en").

checkpoints.name: Hreflang Tags
checkpoints.evidence: No hreflang tags found (informational -- may be a single-language site)

checkpoints.name: llms.txt
checkpoints.evidence: No llms.txt found (informational -- optional emerging standard for LLM guidance)

checkpoints.name: manifest.json (PWA)
checkpoints.evidence: No manifest.json found (informational -- required only for PWA installability)

checkpoints.name: Character Encoding
checkpoints.evidence: UTF-8 charset declared via meta: utf-8

checkpoints.name: ads.txt
checkpoints.evidence: No ads.txt found (informational — required only for sites running programmatic advertising)

checkpoints.name: Structured Data Coverage
checkpoints.evidence: No structured data found (JSON-LD, Microdata, or RDFa)
checkpoints.recommendation: Add JSON-LD structured data (Organization, WebSite, BreadcrumbList at minimum) to improve search engine understanding.
